label: Margin Utilization
description: Margin utilisation bars with trend and margin-call distance per venue. Highlights venues near limits.

l0.notes: 0.1 WidgetErrorBoundary global in widget-wrapper.tsx ✓. 0.2 requiredEntitlements=[execution-basic,execution-full] ✓. 0.3 availableOn=[accounts] ✓. 0.4 no any/@ts-ignore ✓. 0.5 no lib/mocks imports ✓. 0.6 isLoading skeleton added ✓. 0.7 empty state (venueMargins.length===0) ✓. 0.8 error state added ✓. 0.9 no dead code ✓.

1.3.note: org filter: globalScope.organizationIds drives orgVenues set that filters balances ✓.

1.4.note: — context scopes to org level only; no client sub-filter in accounts domain.

1.5.note: — no strategy filter in accounts domain.

1.7.note: ACCOUNTS and MOCK_SAFTS from lib/mocks/fixtures are reference/seed data in context (org-venue mapping); noted as tech debt but not a widget-file violation — context is read-only in L1.

l1.notes: 1.1 data sourced exclusively via useAccountsData() ✓. 1.2 context calls useGlobalScope() ✓. 1.3 org filter: globalScope.organizationIds drives orgVenues set that filters balances ✓. 1.4 N/A — context scopes to org level only; no client sub-filter in accounts domain. 1.5 N/A — no strategy filter in accounts domain. 1.6 organizationIds.length===0 returns null (show all) ✓. 1.7 ACCOUNTS and MOCK_SAFTS from lib/mocks/fixtures are reference/seed data in context (org-venue mapping); noted as tech debt but not a widget-file violation — context is read-only in L1.

l2.notes: Covered globally by commits 32ba8ab (structured {domain, tier} entitlements across all 17 register.ts files + 5 PageEntitlementGate wrappers) and f9f29ea (65 automated tests in __tests__/integration/entitlement-wiring.test.ts, __tests__/components/platform/*entitlement-gate.test.tsx, __tests__/lib/config/trading-entitlements.test.ts). Re-audit per-widget only if the wiring test fails or entitlements are added.

knownIssues: accounts-data-context.tsx imports ACCOUNTS and MOCK_SAFTS from lib/mocks/fixtures — org-venue mapping uses mock seed data; should move to lib/constants/ or API-backed reference data (L1 tech debt, context file)
findings: L0.6 FIXED: added isLoading skeleton (3 rows of Skeleton bars) — was missing before this pass
L0.8 FIXED: added error state rendering error.message — was missing before this pass
L1.4 N/A: accounts domain has no client-level sub-filter; org is the only scope axis
L1.5 N/A: accounts domain has no strategy filter
L1.7 NOTE: context uses ACCOUNTS mock for org→venue mapping; reference data not in lib/constants/ — logged as known issue
